summary: W886 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing the W885 bundled endpoint strict-topology provider with four explicit endpoint facts. The assembled W720 provider feeds W885, then W884, W883, W882, W881, W880, and W879. Product success remains false because the explicit W886 fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W886 exposes the W720 endpoint strict-topology provider as four explicit facts, but those facts and the other W886 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

The remaining W886 fields are boundary data, relation data, target surjectivity and compactness, matched selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closedness branch data, normalized fixed-target data, a Pretriangulated structure on BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA, an IsTriangulated structure on that source, source-side triangle-completion data, forgetful homology preservation, endpoint closed-embedding facts, endpoint open-map facts, endpoint ExactAt epi facts, and localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirteen W886 explicit endpoint-field inputs.
Continue splitting or discharging the remaining bundled providers only when the split is supported by current Lean definitions and provider-search evidence.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
